query:
INSERT INTO cities (name, countryId, isActive) VALUES
('Istanbul', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Ankara', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Izmir', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Bursa', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Antalya', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Adana', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Konya', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Gaziantep', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Mersin', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Kayseri', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Trabzon', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1),
('Bodrum', (SELECT id FROM countries WHERE code = 'TR'), 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name=VALUES(name);
